name: cc-local-marketplace
description: Local marketplace for Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: swift-project-tools
plugins.description: Skills for setting up and extending Swift Project Tools in iOS/Swift projects

plugins.name: agent-orchestration
plugins.description: Protocol for dispatching, monitoring, and recovering from subagent failures — pre-flight checks, retry policy, fallback strategy, output contracts, and team swarm coordination

plugins.name: session-manager
plugins.description: Terminal session management - fork sessions, run commands in panes/tabs, capture output

plugins.name: claude-usage-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyze Claude Code session usage data and generate comprehensive reports

plugins.name: default-tools
plugins.description: Tool auto-approval with sensitive-path guards, Ollama LLM fallback, macOS notifications, and an opt-in Stop-hook code review with pluggable reviewers (local LLM, generic CLI, in-session subagent)

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: Capture knowledge from Claude Code conversations and store them as notes in an Obsidian vault

plugins.name: neo-writing-style
plugins.description: Neo's personal writing style guide for composing zh-tw technical and editorial articles

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Workflow utilities — session retrospective with CLAUDE.md, user instructions, and auto memory suggestions

plugins.name: shopping-price-compare
plugins.description: Compare product prices, points, and discounts across Japanese shopping sites using the logged-in browser when available
